analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit across 6 sites crawled 306 pages from 619 requested URLs with 103.4% crawl coverage. Critical issues include 58 confirmed broken internal links, 30.07% SEO/GEO issue rate, and only 34.04% API reference coverage across 20 detected API pages. Freshness metadata is present on only 13.4% of pages, limiting change tracking. Overall confidence is 71.85%, with links confidence notably low at 45.88% due to 56 unverified URLs blocked by auth/rate-limits. Multi-project topology acknowledged; no fragmentation penalty applied.
strengths: High crawl coverage at 103.4% indicates comprehensive site discovery and indexing
Multi-project documentation structure properly identified and scoped across 6 distinct sites
API documentation pages successfully detected (20 pages) with coverage measurement enabled
Overall confidence of 71.85% provides reasonable assurance for most findings
Example code reliability estimated at 75.25%, suggesting functional code samples
risks: 58 confirmed broken internal links degrade user navigation and trust across all documentation sites
56 unverified links (auth/rate-limit blocked) represent unknown documentation quality exposure
API reference coverage at 34.04% leaves two-thirds of API surface undocumented or poorly covered
SEO/GEO issue rate of 30.07% significantly impacts discoverability and search ranking
Only 13.4% freshness coverage prevents users from assessing content currency and maintenance status
Links confidence at 45.88% indicates substantial uncertainty in link health assessment
41 trap URLs skipped may hide additional content quality issues in edge cases

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 58 confirmed broken internal links to restore navigation integrity across documentation sites
Expand API reference documentation to achieve minimum 70% coverage across detected API surface
Implement last-updated metadata on all pages to increase freshness visibility from 13.4% to 90%+
Resolve SEO/GEO issues affecting 30.07% of pages (meta descriptions, titles, structured data)
Manually verify 56 auth-blocked URLs and establish monitoring for protected documentation endpoints

limitations: External audit cannot verify content accuracy, technical correctness, or completeness of explanations within pages
56 URLs blocked by authentication or rate-limits remain unverified; actual broken link count may be higher
API coverage detection relies on heuristics; actual API completeness requires internal schema comparison
Crawl traps (41 skipped URLs) may contain additional quality issues not reflected in this assessment
Multi-project topology assumes intentional separation; user experience fragmentation not evaluated
